name: BusinessKit Agent
description: Autonomous business agent team for BusinessKit — CEO, CMO, COO, CBO, Blog Writer, Course Creator, Store Manager, Newsletter Writer, CRM Agent, Social Agent and more. Works with Claude Code, Claude Cowork, Gemini CLI, Codex, and any terminal. Powered by your own Turso database.
author: BusinessKit

commands.name: ceo
commands.description: CEO — weekly briefing, cross-agent orchestration, priority setting

commands.name: cmo
commands.description: CMO — content calendar, campaign strategy, growth recommendations

commands.name: coo
commands.description: COO — content pipeline, publish queue, scheduling oversight

commands.name: cbo
commands.description: CBO — revenue analysis, product strategy, pricing recommendations

commands.name: blog-writer
commands.description: Blog Writer — create and publish blog posts

commands.name: newsletter-writer
commands.description: Newsletter Writer — write and send newsletters to subscribers

commands.name: copywriter
commands.description: Copywriter — landing pages, product descriptions, profile bio and tagline

commands.name: course-creator
commands.description: Course Creator — build courses with lessons and manage students

commands.name: store-manager
commands.description: Store Manager — add downloads, meetings, webinars, events, listings, sponsorships, services

commands.name: jobs-manager
commands.description: Jobs Manager — post job listings and view applications

commands.name: forms-builder
commands.description: Forms Builder — build forms with questions and view submissions

commands.name: docs-writer
commands.description: Docs Writer — write knowledge base articles and manage collections

commands.name: crm
commands.description: CRM Agent — contacts, deals, outreach pipeline, tasks, approval flow

commands.name: social
commands.description: Social Agent — schedule and publish to 13 platforms via Zernio

commands.name: analytics
commands.description: Analytics Agent — full snapshot of traffic, revenue, links and forms

commands.name: seo
commands.description: SEO Agent — audit slugs, meta descriptions and category SEO

commands.name: scheduler
commands.description: Scheduler — run publish queue and manage scheduled content

commands.name: deep
commands.description: Deep Mode — CEO takes over, plans and delegates to full team

setup.instructions: Copy .env.example to .env and paste your Turso credentials from BusinessKit → Settings → Credentials
